description: G3MIT Standard Security Baseline. Configures Lithnet Idle Logoff to automatically log off inactive Windows user sessions after 240 minutes of inactivity. A warning message is displayed 60 seconds before logoff. This policy is for session cleanup only; workstation locking is handled separately by SEC-WIN-LOCK-10MIN-STD using the CIS Interactive Logon Machine Inactivity Limit policy.

WarningMessage.value: This workstation has been inactive and will be logged off in {0}. Please move the mouse or press a key to continue your session.
